$1_$N.description: Individual fields of the current record. $1 is the first field, $NF is the last.

NR.description: Number of Records - the current line number across all files.

NF.description: Number of Fields in the current record.

FNR.description: File Number of Records - line number in the current file (resets per file).

FS.description: Field Separator for input. Default is whitespace. Set in BEGIN block or with -F flag.

OFS.description: Output Field Separator. Used by print when separating fields with comma.

RS.description: Record Separator for input. Default is newline. Set to empty string for paragraph mode.

ORS.description: Output Record Separator. Default is newline.

BEGIN.description: Code executed once before reading any input. Used for initialization.

END.description: Code executed once after all input is processed. Used for summaries and cleanup.

print.description: Output values separated by OFS, followed by ORS.

gsub.description: Global substitution. Replace all matches with replacement in target (default $0).

sub.description: Substitute first match of regex with replacement in target (default $0).

split.description: Split string into array elements by separator. Returns number of pieces.

length.description: Return length of string, or number of elements in array.

match.description: Search string for regex. Sets RSTART and RLENGTH. Returns position or 0.

getline.description: Read the next line from input, a file, or a command pipe.
